prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about AI agents and identity security. The angle I care about is that most companies are deploying AI agents without thinking about what identity those agents use — they just use shared service accounts.

assertions.name: hook-is-not-preamble
assertions.description: First line is a direct assertion or insight, not a 'wanted to share' opener or chronological setup

assertions.name: no-em-dash
assertions.description: Post body contains no em dashes (—)

assertions.name: ends-with-specific-question
assertions.description: Post ends with a specific, non-generic question (not just 'what do you think?')

assertions.name: proper-hashtags
assertions.description: Includes 3-5 hashtags in # format at the end of the post

assertions.name: includes-rationale
assertions.description: Output includes a rationale section explaining hook and structure choices
